530 ALTRD_DIET_DSCHRG_CD ALTRD_DIET_DSCHRG_CD Nutritional Approaches (Discharge): Mech Alt Diet CHAR 1 This column documents whether the patient needed a mechanically altered diet as their nutritional approach at the time of discharge. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
